summary: MCP tool execution bypasses TypedResult enrichment — always reports status: "succeeded" to plugin hooks and event system
~25+ tool implementations set metadata.status instead of metadata.toolStatus — processor.ts only checks toolStatus, so all these tools are treated as succeeded even when they self-report failure
context/tools.ts returns Tool.ExecuteResult with empty metadata (no toolStatus) — all context query tools invisible to failure detection
event/agent-queries.ts returns Tool.ExecuteResult without toolStatus — event query tools always treated as successful
tool/registry.ts plugin tool execution and local tool wrapping omit metadata.toolStatus — plugin tools invisible to failure detection
